CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (x INT, y INT);
SELECT n.a - n.b, m.x - m.y FROM numbers AS n JOIN more_numbers AS m ON n.a = 10;
WITH (SELECT a, b FROM numbers) AS n SELECT a - b FROM n;
CREATE TABLE complex_numbers (id INT, value_a FLOAT, value_b FLOAT);
SELECT id, value_a - value_b AS result FROM complex_numbers;
SELECT a - b FROM (SELECT x AS a, y AS b FROM numbers) WHERE a > 5;
SELECT (SELECT AVG(a) FROM numbers) - (SELECT AVG(b) FROM numbers);
CREATE TABLE grouped_numbers (group_id INT, val_a INT, val_b INT);
SELECT group_id, SUM(val_a) - SUM(val_b) AS total_difference FROM grouped_numbers GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(a) FROM numbers) - (SELECT MIN(b) FROM more_numbers) AS boundary_difference;
